interhour-sixth-theotokion.label: Theotokion of the Interhour of the Sixth Hour
interhour-sixth-theotokion.text: O Theotokos, thou art a vine bearing the true Grape, who hast blossomed for us the fruit of life. Wherefore we beseech thee, intercede with Him for our souls, that He may grant them forgiveness of sins.
